debug_mode.description: Enable verbose debug logging for the bot-base plugin (live mode when off)

link_token_ttl_seconds.description: How long an issued one-time link token stays redeemable, in seconds (D3 identity linking). Default 15 minutes.

conversation_idle_timeout_seconds.description: How long a chat's active conversation owner persists without activity before it is treated as cleared, in seconds. After this, free text falls back to the help menu. Default 30 minutes.
